_meta.description: News and press releases related to US Bitcoin mining companies
_meta.note: MOCK DATA - Replace with real news articles from data agent

data.title: Marathon Digital Holdings Reports Q3 2024 Financial Results
data.summary: Marathon reported revenue of $131.6M in Q3 2024, up 78% YoY. Net loss of $124.8M due to unrealized BTC fair value losses. Produced 4,921 BTC in Q3, up 11% QoQ. Held 26,842 BTC on balance sheet.

data.title: Marathon Digital Acquires Two Bitcoin Mining Sites in Finland
data.summary: Marathon acquired two Bitcoin mining data centers in Finland for approximately $52.5M, adding 114 MW of capacity using low-cost, renewable hydroelectric power.

data.title: Riot Platforms Receives Subpoena from SEC
data.summary: Riot Platforms disclosed it received an SEC subpoena related to an investigation. The company said it intends to cooperate fully with the SEC's investigation.

data.title: Core Scientific Secures 200MW AI Data Center Deal with CoreWeave
data.summary: Core Scientific signed a 12-year, $5.75B contract with CoreWeave to convert mining facilities to AI data centers, representing a major strategic pivot. The deal adds approximately $8.7B in total revenue over the contract term.

data.title: Bitcoin Halving Cuts Mining Rewards; Industry Adapts
data.summary: The Bitcoin network completed its fourth halving on April 20, 2024, cutting miner rewards from 6.25 to 3.125 BTC per block. Public miners are adapting through fleet upgrades, M&A activity, and pivoting to AI/HPC hosting.

data.title: CleanSpark Reaches 20 EH/s Mining Capacity Target Ahead of Schedule
data.summary: CleanSpark announced it achieved its 20 EH/s hash rate target ahead of schedule, driven by new site deployments in Wyoming and Georgia. The company now has operations across 5 states.

data.title: TeraWulf Achieves 100% Nuclear-Powered Bitcoin Mining at Lake Anna
data.summary: TeraWulf achieved 100% carbon-free, nuclear-powered Bitcoin mining at its Lake Anna facility, powered by Dominion Energy's North Anna Power Station. The company touts the lowest carbon intensity among public miners.

data.title: US Government Signals Crypto-Friendly Policy Stance Under New Administration
data.summary: The new US administration signaled a pro-crypto policy stance, including potential rolling back of restrictive banking rules for crypto firms and a more accommodative SEC approach. Bitcoin mining stocks rallied sharply.

data.title: Hut 8 Corp Buys 990 BTC Worth of Bitcoin for Treasury
data.summary: Hut 8 purchased an additional 990 Bitcoin for its corporate treasury, bringing total holdings to over 9,100 BTC. The company joins MicroStrategy's playbook of accumulating BTC as a reserve asset.

data.title: Applied Digital Pivots to AI Infrastructure with $160M Financing Deal
data.summary: Applied Digital secured a $160M credit facility to fund its AI data center expansion, signaling a strategic shift away from Bitcoin mining toward high-margin AI/HPC hosting. The company expects AI revenue to exceed mining revenue by Q2 FY2026.

data.title: Riot Platforms Acquires 1,019 Acres of Land for Kentucky Data Center Expansion
data.summary: Riot acquired over 1,000 acres in Payneville, Kentucky for a new large-scale Bitcoin mining and data center campus. The site has potential for over 600 MW of power capacity.

data.title: Bitcoin Reaches $100,000 Milestone for First Time
data.summary: Bitcoin crossed $100,000 for the first time on December 4, 2024, driven by post-election crypto optimism, institutional ETF inflows, and growing corporate adoption. Mining stocks surged as profitability outlook improved significantly.

data.title: Bitcoin Stocks To Follow Today – February 20th
data.summary: IREN, TeraWulf, Riot Platforms, Cipher Mining, Marathon Digital, CleanSpark, and Abits Group are the seven Bitcoin stocks to watch today, according to MarketBeat's stock screener tool. These companies had the highest dollar trading volume of any Bitcoin stocks within the last several days.

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Stocks Surge As Market Optimism Jumps
data.summary: Marathon Digital Holdings (NASDAQ: MARA) climbed 7.97% to $21.13, Riot Platforms (NASDAQ: RIOT) jumped 11.21% to $22.28, and CleanSpark (NASDAQ: CLSK) rose 9.09% to $21.30, driven by overall market optimism.

data.title: Top 6 Bitcoin Mining Stocks – The Best Bitcoin Mining Companies to Invest in for 2026
data.summary: As of January 2026, CleanSpark had 133,963 ASIC miners in its fleet, achieving efficiency of 16.1 J/TH. Fleet hashrate capacity of 50.0 EH/s. Company holds over 13,500 BTC.

data.title: Bitcoin mining stocks rally as Riot inks AMD deal and Galaxy targets massive expansion in Texas
data.summary: CleanSpark signed a definitive agreement to acquire 447 acres in Texas to develop a large-scale data center. Bitfarms also making expansion moves.

data.title: Bitcoin Mining 2026: AI Pivot, Profitability Pressure & Consolidation
data.summary: MARA Holdings, Riot Platforms, Hut 8 and CleanSpark are among the top 10 public Bitcoin holders. Miners are pivoting to AI for new revenue streams amid profitability pressure.

data.title: Bitcoin mining stocks Hit New Highs on AI Pivot with CleanSpark Leading the Pack
data.summary: Many mining companies are pivoting beyond Bitcoin mining after the 2024 halving reduced rewards. MARA, Riot, Canaan, Core Scientific, Bitdeer, Hut 8, Cipher Mining, and TeraWulf have all announced AI diversification plans.

data.title: MARA Holdings CEO has shares withheld to cover RSU tax liability
data.summary: CEO Frederick G. Thiel had 67,704 shares of common stock withheld on February 5, 2026 to cover his tax liability from vesting restricted stock units, at a price of $9.12 per share.

data.title: Bitcoin Miners at a Crossroads: Gain Market Share or Go All-In on AI?
data.summary: MARA, RIOT and CLSK increased their share of total bitcoin mined last month versus August. Miners face choice between gaining market share or pivoting to AI.

data.title: Bitcoin mining stocks MARA, CleanSpark rise as network difficulty eases
data.summary: IREN led YTD performance with 357% gain, followed by TeraWulf 154%, Hut 104%, CleanSpark 53%, Riot 48%, Core Scientific 18%. MARA down 28% YTD.

data.title: Bitcoin Stocks To Follow Today – February 20th
data.summary: IREN, TeraWulf, Riot Platforms, Cipher Mining, Marathon Digital, CleanSpark, and Abits Group are the seven Bitcoin stocks to watch today.

data.title: What Are the Top 10 Bitcoin Mining Stocks to Watch in 2026?
data.summary: Public miners with >10 EH/s capacity like MARA and RIOT generating record monthly BTC production. Hut 8 and Bitfarms added AI compute leasing, CleanSpark expanding into data center colocation.
